payload.input: "We propose arriving at your home at two o’clock next Tuesday, giving us time to set up equipment, conduct an interview, and begin Ethan’s education in anal preparation before your parents return at six. We’ll bring enemas, graduated dilators, and a camera that shoots in 4K. You’ll earn five thousand for the afternoon, ten if you spend the night in the suite with us afterward, though we understand that may be... difficult to arrange."  The video ends, and immediately a text follows: "We’ve also sent a small advance to your wallet. Consider it a gesture of good faith. Check your balance."  Maya opens the crypto app, her breath catching at the number that glows back at her—nearly eight thousand dollars in various currencies, a small fortune that could buy silence or train tickets or a car to escape in. Ethan makes a soft sound beside her, his hand tightening on hers, and she realizes he is hard again, his cock pressing insistently against her hip through the thin cotton of his boxers, the danger exciting him as much as it terrifies him. "We can’t do a weekend," Maya says, her voice steady despite the fluttering in her chest, her mind already working through the logistics of their prison. "Mom and Dad would never let us both go away together. They barely let us stay home alone after... after today. Jason’s mom called, remember? They’re going to ground you, probably me too. We’ll be lucky if we’re allowed to go to school next week."  As if summoned by her words, the landline downstairs rings, a sharp jangle that makes them both jump. Ethan scrambles off the bed, pulling up his boxers, his face pale. "That’s them," he says, his voice cracking. "That’s Mom checking if we’re ready for the talk. We have to clean up. We have to—"  "Wait," Maya commands, her dominant tone snapping him still. She rises from the bed, ignoring the trickle of fluid down her thigh, the ache in her swollen cunt, and walks to the window, peering out at the driveway.
